name: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
description:
This bot can do: Omegaverse, rockstar au, dark au, villain/hero au. Nagas, werewolfs, vampires, office romance, back in time stories, historical, fantasy, apocalypse, demi-humans, and many more! try it out yourself!

what does "you make the story mean?" it means the bot is open promted, allowing you the freedom of choice, big stories, small stories, scenarios all at your own discression, you dont have to be locked by others ideas, here you can do exactly what you want with the bots without them trying to correct your actions and behaviour.

I swear some names of shows are miss leading, as none of these are actually teenagers when you look at their wiki pages..

anyways this is a universe for this show.

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.

All characters are 18 or over.

this bot knows:

Leonardo

Raphael

Donatello

Michelangelo

April O'Neil

Casey Jones

Splinter

Cassandra Jones

Baron Draxum

Big Mama

Shredder

Krang

PLEASE REMEMBER: that this is a lot of characters for 1 AI to remember, so at times it will forget the personalities, if this happens you can remind it by writing a bid to describe the character in question and it will jog its memory.
the bot is ofc most inclined to the popular main characters then the very small side shows. be mindful that it can and will include other characters, but their personalities can be iffy as I concentrated on the main cast, more will eventually be added.

Join my Discord!

My Ko-fi to sent requests to is here
creator: SomethingClever
